document.title: 1320 Content Database Index v2
document.purpose: Master index for all S0–S9 content databases, defining module ranges, file references, lookup keys, rendering fields, product tier placement, and safety rules for NOVA.

global_rules.database_role: Content databases are the source of truth for user-facing interpretations. NOVA calculates codes, looks up matching records, and renders the approved content.
nova_generation_boundary: NOVA may generate short bridge sentences, section transitions, integration summaries, and localized formatting.
NOVA must not generate core interpretation fields from scratch when the field exists in the content database.
NOVA must preserve the symbolic, reflective, non-deterministic tone.
NOVA must not convert any code into destiny, fixed identity, diagnosis, prediction, financial advice, or spiritual rank.
global_rules.safe_language_note: All interpretations are symbolic and reflective. They are not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious instructions, and they do not define a fixed identity.

S0-S4.function: Helps the user see foundational patterns clearly.

S5-S7.function: Helps the user transform awareness into mission, value, receiving, and sovereignty.

S8-S9.function: Helps the user integrate life themes into contribution and return-to-source reflection.

databases.name: Void Gate
databases.nova_instruction: Calculate S0 and lookup corresponding Void Gate content. Use reflective language and do not frame the void gate as fate or defect.

databases.name: Soul Origin
databases.zero_rule: Not applicable under normal year digit sum.
databases.nova_instruction: Use S1 as the foundational origin frequency. Do not treat archetype as fixed identity.

databases.name: Soul Mirror
databases.code_range: S2-02 to S2-43 for valid Gregorian dates; legacy range may extend depending on source database
databases.nova_instruction: Use S2 to reflect relational mirror patterns. Do not instruct users to stay, leave, pursue, or end any relationship.

databases.name: Soul Vibration
databases.code_range: Defined by official S3 vibration_level mapping table
databases.nova_instruction: NOVA must not infer S3 without the official vibration_level mapping table. If mapping table is unavailable, return an error or missing mapping warning.

databases.name: Core Shadow Pattern
databases.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S4-00. Do not convert to 20.
databases.nova_instruction: Lookup S4 content directly. This layer should describe protective loops, not diagnose pathology.

databases.name: Soul Mission
databases.zero_rule: If result is 0, convert to S5-44.
rendering_fields: What Your Soul Is Learning to Express
databases.nova_instruction: NOVA must retrieve the seven S5 blocks from the content database. Do not generate How Your Patterns Become Mission from scratch.

databases.name: Value & Receiving
databases.zero_rule: If result is 0, convert to S6-44.
rendering_fields: What Your Soul Is Learning to Receive
databases.nova_instruction: User-visible output must use Value & Receiving language. Do not output Money Frequency as the public label. Do not provide financial predictions or investment advice.

databases.name: Soul Sovereignty
rendering_fields: What Your Soul Is Learning to Choose
databases.nova_instruction: Use S7 to reflect agency, boundary, and choice. Do not tell the user what decision to make.

databases.name: Soul Contribution
rendering_fields: How Your Life Themes Become Contribution
Who or What You May Serve
databases.nova_instruction: Use S8 as an integration reflection, not as a rank or proof of awakening.

databases.name: Return to Source
databases.nova_instruction: Use S9 as return-to-wholeness reflection. Do not frame it as a final answer, spiritual graduation, or ultimate truth.

status_legend.completed_v1: Content and calculation logic exist in current upgraded architecture, first complete version.
status_legend.completed_v4: Content and calculation logic exist in current upgraded architecture with multiple iterations and finalized rendering blocks.
status_legend.source_sample_confirmed: Source format and content sample confirmed from uploaded source.
status_legend.needs_alignment_or_confirmed_source: Needs final v2 content database confirmation or migration from legacy source.
status_legend.legacy_content_exists_needs_v2_index_con: Legacy content exists but should be confirmed against v2 naming and rendering fields.
status_legend.requires_official_mapping_table: Cannot be safely computed without official mapping table.

repo_corrections.S4: Steward pack uses 1320_S4_Core_Shadow_Pattern_Content_Database_v2_EN.json; original index listed Awareness_Layer v1 name.
repo_corrections.S7_json_keys: Content DB uses what_your_soul_is_learning_to_reclaim; index rendering_fields use Choose wording.

for_developers: Use this index to connect NOVA calculation outputs to the correct content database file.
Do not hard-code user-facing descriptions in calculation logic if the content database includes that field.
Each module output should include code, name, localized name, layer, content fields, and safe language note.
If a database file listed here is not present in production, return a controlled missing_content_database error.
for_content_team: S0, S1, S2, and S3 may need final v2 alignment if legacy files are not yet migrated.
S5 is currently the most stable version and should be used as the model for future content database field structure.
S6 should retain Value & Receiving language and avoid reverting to Money Frequency publicly.
S8–S9 should remain integration layers, not hierarchy or enlightenment language.
